function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by running OCR-style frontmatter migration on all 8 specified finance records, preserving each original body verbatim below new YAML frontmatter, then deleting the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), read required system workflows and schema before task work, used exact finance frontmatter shape, preserved original body text verbatim during migration, completed full request without partials, and deleted processed inbox file per inbox workflow.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox task explicitly requested OCR workflow on 8 listed finance files. Each target file had visible required schema fields (invoice/bill metadata plus line items), so frontmatter could be added without guessing. All 8 files were updated accordingly and the source inbox file was removed after completion as required by process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
completed_steps_laconic: write YAML frontmatter into all 8 records preserving body
